title: Praesodynium
description: The perfect balance between modded and vanilla.
body:
# Summary
Praesodynium is a Fabric modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with a focus on performance optimization, exploration, and informative tools. It offers a carefully curated selection of mods that work together seamlessly to create a smoother, more visually stunning, and content-rich world.

## Features
  ### Performance Boost:

  - Sodium and Lithium provide great performance improvements, significantly reducing lag and greatly increasing stability.
  - Dynamic FPS saves resources so you can do other things (e.g. Watching a tutorial) while having good FPS.
  - Memory Leak Fix and Concurrent Chunk Management Engine address memory management issues for long-term stability.

  ### Exploration Enhancements:

- Terralith completely overhauls the world generation, creating breathtaking new biomes and landscapes to discover.
- Nullscape emphazizes the Barren landscape of the end while adding life to the final dimension.
- Incendium (only on release versions) Overhauls the nether into a diverse,. rich landscape
- Xaero's Minimap provides an invaluable on-screen map for easier navigation through your world, which is further enhanced by the world map.

### Informative Tools:

- Just Enough Items (JEI) grants you easy access to crafting recipes and information about all in-game items.
- AppleSkin displays valuable information about food, such as sat
- Better F3 provides a clean way to get the important elements of the f3 screen


### Additional Features:

- Fast Better Grass improves grass rendering for a lusher and more natural-looking world.
abricSkyboxes lets you customize the sky with diverse and beautiful skybox options.
- Iris Shaders (optional) unlocks stunning visual effects for a truly immersive experience.

Praesodynium strikes a perfect balance between performance improvements, exploration content, informative tools, and Vanilla. Dive into a world of vibrant landscapes, conquer the revamped End dimension, and explore with ease using this feature-packed Fabric modpack!

## Version Formatting
It is in form x.y.z
- x is incremented when the modpack is updated to the next official Minecraft Update 
- y is incremented when x is not incremented and new mods are added
- z is incremented when mods aare updated and neither y or x are incremented
- y and z are reset if x is incremented
- z is reset is y is incremented
